name: python3-debconf
title: python3-debconf
description:
interact with debconf from Python 3
Debconf is a configuration management system for debian packages. Packages
use Debconf to ask questions when they are installed.
.
This package provides a debconf module to allow Python 3 programs to
interact with a debconf frontend.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-debconf because interact with debconf from Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-debconf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-debconf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-debconf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
